query: SELECT q.id, q.stageId, q.questionText, q.questionType, q.options, q.metadata, q.orderIndex FROM questions q WHERE q.stageId IN (60001,60002,60003,60004,60005,60006,60007,60008,60009) ORDER BY q.stageId, q.orderIndex;
